title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the OLX India family as a Senior Software Engineer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OLX India:
OLX India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India!
